mapper.update:
update sys_org
ORG_ID = #{orgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_CODE = #{orgCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_NAME = #{orgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_SHORT_NAME = #{orgShortName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_PARENT_ID = #{orgParentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_TYPE = #{orgType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ORG_LEVEL = #{orgLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ORG_SORT = #{orgSort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ORG_STATUS = #{orgStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_CORP_ID = #{orgCorpId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_CORP_NAME = #{orgCorpName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_BRANCH_ID = #{orgBranchId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_BRANCH_NAME = #{orgBranchName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_CITY_ID = #{orgCityId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_CITY_NAME = #{orgCityName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_County_ID = #{orgCountyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_County_name = #{orgCountyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_SEQ = #{orgSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG_SEQ_CH = #{orgSeqCh,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Create_Pk = #{createPk,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Create_By = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Modify_Pk = #{modifyPk,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Modify_By = #{modifyBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Create_Time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Modify_Time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update sys_org set ORG_ID = #{orgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_CODE = #{orgCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_NAME = #{orgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_SHORT_NAME = #{orgShortName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_PARENT_ID = #{orgParentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_TYPE = #{orgType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ORG_LEVEL = #{orgLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ORG_SORT = #{orgSort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ORG_STATUS = #{orgStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_CORP_ID = #{orgCorpId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_CORP_NAME = #{orgCorpName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_BRANCH_ID = #{orgBranchId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_BRANCH_NAME = #{orgBranchName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_CITY_ID = #{orgCityId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_CITY_NAME = #{orgCityName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_County_ID = #{orgCountyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_County_name = #{orgCountyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_SEQ = #{orgSeq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG_SEQ_CH = #{orgSeqCh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Create_Pk = #{createPk,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Create_By = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Modify_Pk = #{modifyPk,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Modify_By = #{modifyBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Create_Time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, Modify_Time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
